G0.label:
case neg
α : Type
p : α → Prop
inst✝ : DecidablePred p
as✝ : List α
a a' : α
as : List α
ih : a ∈ filter p as → a ∈ as ∧ p a
h : a ∈ filter p (a' :: as)
ha' : ¬p a'
⊢ a ∈ a' :: as ∧ p a

G2.label:
case a
